budgetEvidence.hardwareTimingRationale: An NTSC NES frame permits one complete fixed-pool update plus VBlank OAM publication; accepted logical spawns must reach retained OAM by the following frame.
budgetEvidence.productionTraceRationale: The production timer requests a shot every ten ticks; the NES two-slot hero pool must preserve the same drop, despawn, reuse, and retained-OAM contract.
